title: Mudhan Mudhalaga Song Lyrics Engal Anna
stanzas:
sil endru ennai
seendi sendridum
megathai naan paarthen

mounangalaal ennai
nee thaakkinaai
mogangalaal ennai
kaithaakinaai
idhu niyayam thaanaa
sollu kannae.

sil endru ennai
seendi sendridum
megathai naan paarthen

Margazhiyin rathiriyil
manasukkul malligai poo
moodivaitha udhadugalil
muthangalin munu munupu

thookkathai thookkathai
thookkile podanum
kanavilum vandhum ne
imisaigal seigiraai

un jannalgalai moodaathe
en thendraluku verkiradhu
en kaipudikka varuvaayaa
kairegai ennai kaetkiradhe

Thorkavillai thoagai mayil
ithanai naal yaengiyadhe
megathidam adam pidithu
mazhai thuli vaangiyadhe

yaekkangal theerndhathaa
ennuyir kadhali
unnidam saaindhathe
intha yaeni thaanadi

un sattaikulle idam thaedi
en moochukaatru alaigirathe
un seelai vaasam vandha pinne
en kaalaigalum vidigirathe

sil endru ennai
seendi sendridum
megathai naan paarthen

mounangalaal ennai
nee thaakkinaai
mogangalaal ennai
kaithaakinaai
idhu niyayam thaanaa
sollu kannae.

sil endru ennai
seendi sendridum
megathai naan paarthen

seo.title: Mudhan Mudhalaga Song Lyrics Engal Anna
seo.description: Full Mudhan Mudhalaga songs lyrics, Engal Anna Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Music: Deva, Singer(s): Hariharan, Sadhana Sargam.
seo.keywords: Engal Anna, Deva, Hariharan, Sadhana Sargam, Mudhan Mudhalaga full lyrics, Engal Anna songs lyrics, Mudhan Mudhalaga lyrics snippets, Mudhan Mudhalaga WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Mudhan Mudhalaga lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song Mudhan Mudhalaga?

The song conveys themes of love and longing, expressing deep emotions through its lyrics.

What is the plot context of the song in Engal Anna?

The song is featured in a romantic context within the movie, highlighting the relationship between the lead characters.

Who are the singers of Mudhan Mudhalaga?

The song is sung by renowned artists Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Mudhan Mudhalaga was composed by Deva.

When was the song released?

The song was released on January 14, 2004.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Mudhan Mudhalaga, the characters express their feelings of love and admiration, creating a romantic atmosphere that resonates throughout the film Engal Anna. The soothing melody, brought to life by the harmonious voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, evokes a sense of nostalgia and warmth. The lyrics reflect the beauty of love, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. This song beautifully encapsulates the emotions of longing and connection, leaving a lasting impression on its listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mudhan Mudhalaga from Engal Anna beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Hariharan and Sadhana Sargam, this duet creates a mesmerizing atmosphere that resonates with listeners. Experience the magic of Deva's composition that brings this heartfelt melody to life.
stanzaMeanings: I saw the moon through a window for the first time.
I saw the clouds that were called 'sil' and they were beautiful.
You pulled me with silence, you caught me with your charm, is this fair? Tell me, my dear.
I saw the moon through a window for the first time.
I saw the clouds that were called 'sil' and they were beautiful.
In the night of Margazhi, jasmine flowers bloom in my heart, and the dreams open up before me.
You need to lift the burden, even in dreams you are creating troubles.
Don't close your windows, my breeze is coming to you, will it come to me if I call?
I saw the moon for the first time.
There is no reason for the peacock to dance, why has it rained for so many days?
Has my love found its way to you? This is the reason.
Searching for a place in your heart, my breath is wandering, your presence has made my days restless.
I saw the moon through a window for the first time.
I saw the clouds that were called 'sil' and they were beautiful.
You pulled me with silence, you caught me with your charm, is this fair? Tell me, my dear.
I saw the moon through a window for the first time.
I saw the clouds that were called 'sil' and they were beautiful.
